Here\\u2019s how we decide between a repair and a replacement \\u2014 and how you can tell which one you\\u2019re probably looking at."}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"When a repair makes sense"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"If the damage is localized and the rest of the roof is in good shape, a repair is usually the right call. Good signs for a repair:"}],["$","ul",null,{"children":[["$","li",null,{"children":"A handful of shingles lost to wind, in one area"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"An isolated leak around a vent, chimney or valley"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"A roof that\\u2019s still relatively young, with shingles that are still sealed down"}],["$","li",null,{"children":"Flashing that\\u2019s come loose but is otherwise sound"}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["For a standard shingle repair we charge a flat ",["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/roof-repair","children":"$$274.39 plus GST"}]," \\u2014 one hour on site plus a bundle of shingles \\u2014 with extra time billed hourly and ridge cap or flashing extra. You can book one online without playing phone tag."]}],["$","h2",null,{"children":"When a patch won\\u2019t hold"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The thing most homeowners can\\u2019t see from the ground is whether the shingles around the damage have lost their seal. Once that seal is gone, a patch won\\u2019t survive the next big prairie wind \\u2014 and you\\u2019ve paid twice. That\\u2019s the moment a repair stops being worth it."}],"$L3","$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7"]}]}]}],"$L8"]}]],null,"$L9"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQGCnI65-Bi1i4nnK8Mx5"}
